title: Iran Threatens Strait of Hormuz Closure Amid Tensions
summary: Iran warns it will close the Strait of Hormuz if Trump acts on infrastructure threats, escalating Middle East tensions.
charlotte_impact: Closure would disrupt global oil supply, causing economic instability and potential military confrontation.

title: ICE Agents to Assist Airport Security During DHS Shutdown
summary: Trump announces ICE agents will support airport security as the DHS shutdown continues, raising concerns about immigration enforcement.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of government shutdowns on essential services and resource allocation.

title: Nonprofits Aid TSA Officers During Shutdown
summary: Nonprofits and unions rally to provide food for TSA officers as the government shutdown drags on, showcasing community support.

title: Settler Violence and Casualties in West Bank and Gaza
summary: Israeli settlers attack cars and set fires in the West Bank; 4 Palestinians killed in Gaza amid ongoing tensions.
charlotte_impact: Exacerbates the Israeli-Palestinian conflict and undermines peace efforts.

title: Iranian Missile Strikes Injure 115 in Israel
